description: Returns a schema that decodes a JSON string and then decodes the parsed value using the given schema; useful when the JSON's structure is described by an existing schema. Pair with S.decodeUnknownEffect (decode) / S.encodeUnknownEffect (stringify).
Type-level representation of a schema that parses a JSON string and then decodes the parsed value with the provided schema (interface fromJsonString<S> extends decodeTo<S, String>).

A transformation schema that decodes a JSON-encoded string into an unknown value (decoding fails on invalid JSON; encoding stringifies any valid JSON value). This is the no-schema fallback for JSON.parse/JSON.stringify when no target schema exists.
Type-level representation of a transformation schema that decodes JSON-encoded strings into unknown values (interface UnknownFromJsonString extends fromJsonString<Unknown>).

Decodes an unknown input against a schema, returning an Effect that succeeds with the decoded value or fails with a SchemaError. Use this when the input type is not statically known; prefer decodeEffect when the input is already typed as the schema's Encoded type. Canonical runner for S.fromJsonString / S.UnknownFromJsonString decode.

Encodes an unknown input against a schema, returning an Effect that succeeds with the encoded value or fails with a SchemaError. Use this when the input type is not statically known; prefer encodeEffect when the input is already typed as the schema's Type. Canonical runner for stringify via S.fromJsonString / S.UnknownFromJsonString.
examples:
import { Effect, Schema } from "effect"

const NumberFromString = Schema.NumberFromString

Effect.runPromise(Schema.encodeUnknownEffect(NumberFromString)(42)).then(console.log)
// Output: "42"

description: Decodes an unknown input against a schema synchronously, returning the decoded value or throwing an Error whose cause contains the schema issue; only service-free schemas can be decoded synchronously. Synchronous sibling runner for JSON decode at boundaries.

Encodes an unknown input against a schema synchronously, returning the encoded value or throwing an Error whose cause contains the schema issue; only service-free schemas can be encoded synchronously. Synchronous sibling runner for JSON stringify at boundaries.

Decodes an unknown input against a schema, returning a Result that succeeds with the decoded value or fails with a schema issue; for typed input use decodeResult. In effect v4 the Result variant replaces the v3 Either runner.

Encodes an unknown input against a schema, returning a Result that succeeds with the encoded value or fails with a schema issue; for typed input use encodeResult. In effect v4 the Result variant replaces the v3 Either runner.
Schema (Codec<Json>) that accepts and validates any immutable JSON-compatible value. Useful as the inner schema for a JSON value of unknown shape (e.g. S.fromJsonString(S.Json)).

Recursive TypeScript type for any valid immutable JSON value: null, number, boolean, string, a readonly array of Json values (JsonArray), or a readonly record of string -> Json (JsonObject). The closest neighbor to a JsonValue type in this effect version.
Schema (Codec<MutableJson>) that accepts any mutable JSON-compatible value. See Json for the immutable variant.
Recursive TypeScript type for mutable JSON values: null, number, boolean, string, mutable arrays (MutableJsonArray), or mutable string-keyed records (MutableJsonObject).
